decisions.title: Adopt Clerk for auth
decisions.rationale: handles session rotation, SSO, compliance; saves a month of engineering

decisions.title: Freeze new PRs against old middleware
decisions.rationale: prevent new work piling onto the deprecated path during the migration
decisions.source_quote: we're going to stop accepting new feature PRs that touch the old middleware starting this Friday

action_items.title: Build Clerk migration proof-of-concept
action_items.source_quote: I'll have a proof-of-concept by next Wednesday

summary.tldr: Team chose Clerk over Auth0 and a refactor to meet legal's compliance deadline. Jess owns the POC, Sam writes the migration plan, and new PRs against the old middleware are frozen starting Friday.
highlights: Freeze new PRs on old middleware
Clerk migration POC by next Wednesday
